surface_verification.justification: Dependency security version bumps (7 packages to CVE-fixed versions); no source/logic change. Verified by the full server+client suites (3464/3464 green) + clean client (tsc+vite) and server (tsc) builds; the authoritative security verification is the PR's Trivy scan. No user-erlebbare behavior change to drive.

behaviors.behavior: The full server+client suites pass with the bumped dependencies (no regression)
Client + server compile and bundle with the bumped dependencies (no API break)
behaviors.evidence: client `tsc -b && vite build` built in 12.5s; server `tsc` exit 0

behaviors.behavior: The 7 flagged packages resolve to their CVE-fixed versions in the lock files
behaviors.evidence: npm ls: react-router@7.18.0, mermaid@11.16.0, dompurify@3.4.11, uuid@11.1.1 (client); hono@4.12.27, shell-quote@1.9.0, ws@8.21.0 (server)

behaviors.behavior: The security.yml Trivy scan reports 0 high/critical on the new lock files
behaviors.reason: Trivy is not installed locally; the authoritative scan runs in the PR's security.yml CI job and is checked there before merge.
